description: Per-module provenance for the license firewall. Each module maps to how its code came to exist: a public doc/spec URL, a permissive (MIT/Apache) repo + commit + adaptation note, or original clean-room work (byte/behavioral observation). GPL sources are NEVER a provenance entry for shipped packages.
forbidden_sources: Almamu/linux-wallpaperengine (GPL-3.0) — documented formats + observable behavior only, never source

sources: Apple developer documentation: NSApplication (accessory policy), NSStatusItem, NSMenu
https://docs.wallpaperengine.io/en/ (project.json fields, property types, scene structure)
Observed real project.json files (video/web/scene) — public field semantics
Apple developer documentation: NSWindow, CGWindowLevelForKey, collectionBehavior, NSScreen, NSWorkspace, IOKit IOPowerSources, ServiceManagement (SMAppService)
.tex format: linux-wallpaperengine docs/textures/TEXTURE_FORMAT.md (PUBLIC PROSE DOC only)
notscuffed/repkg (treated as format spec — docs only)
trinityhades/WallpaperExtractor (Apache-2.0 — may adapt with NOTICE attribution)
glslang (BSD/Apache), SPIRV-Cross (Apache/MIT), SPIRV-Tools (Apache) — vendored xcframework behind a Swift facade
Reference: linux-wallpaperengine observable output only, compared in the parity tooling (no source reuse)
WE web JS bridge surface: docs.wallpaperengine.io/en/web/ (public API names)
